_about: REAP-25 (LiveCodeBench-50-calibrated) routed-expert survivor map for DeepSeek-V4-Flash, used by the ds4 v5mx build's Path-B REAP transplant (gguf-tools/reap/trim_reap.py).
_recovery: Survivor original-expert-ids were recovered by byte-matching eouya2's compacted F16 ffn_gate_inp router rows against the full 256-row reference router in antirez/deepseek-v4-gguf DeepSeek-V4-Flash-IQ2XXS-w2Q2K-AProjQ8-SExpQ8-OutQ8-chat-v2-imatrix.gguf (the GGUF eouya2 pruned from). All 40 pruned layers matched 192/192 exactly. See gguf-tools/reap/recover_survivors.py.
_license_note: eouya2 repo HF tag is 'license: other'; the bundled ds4 runtime LICENSE is MIT (ds4.c + ggml authors) and the underlying DeepSeek-V4-Flash weights are MIT (general.license='mit' in the GGUF KV). Vendored here is DERIVED INTEGER INDEX METADATA (which experts survive), not any model weights, with attribution. See README.md in this directory.
